action_cue: Monitor. Single sensor, low confidence. Await corroboration.
POSSIBLE UAS CONFIRMED. Track bearing 050, 268ft AGL. Maintain visual. Prepare to report.
VISUAL LOST. RF still active bearing 055-065. Reacquire visually from NE sector. Scan tree line.
REACQUIRED. UAS now loitering over position. Possible ISR. Report immediately. Consider cover/concealment.
UAS departing east. Maintain observation 2 min. Prepare SALUTE report for command.
TRACK CLEARED. Resume normal operations. Submit after-action report. Sync queued for command.
Possible contact SW. Single sensor. Erratic path may indicate biological. Monitor.
LOW CONFIDENCE. No RF signature. Flight pattern consistent with large bird. Recommend DISMISS.
MULTIPLE RF SIGNATURES detected bearing 355. Possible swarm. ELEVATE READINESS.
CRITICAL: 3x UAS SWARM confirmed from N, 285ft, closing. Take cover. Report FLASH to command. Request support.
Swarm breaking formation, climbing, departing east. Maintain observation. Do NOT relax posture until confirmed clear.
SWARM CLEARED. Maintain elevated readiness 10 min. Submit FLASH report. Sync critical — queue for immediate uplink.
